title: CVE-2026-2280: rexCrawler SQL Injection
summary: [P1] The rexCrawler plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to stored cross-site scripting, allowing attackers to inject malicious code. No patch is currently available. Why now: Reported vulnerability in widely used WordPress plugin (confidence: 0.80)
classification_reasoning: Vulnerability allows data tampering through SQL injection

enrichment.lede: CISA Adds Three Known Exploited Vulnerabilities to Catalog.
